column1: Jackson Chourio leads the slate with a strong combination of top hit probability and a favorable home matchup against Matthew Liberatore, who has allowed steady contact to righties. Chourio’s consistency stands out, having recorded a hit in over 82% of games, and he benefits from the leadoff spot and a platoon edge. Luis Arraez is also a reliable option at home with his usual contact skills and a lefty-righty advantage. Bobby Witt Jr. and William Contreras round out the top tier, both offering steady production in solid spots.
